items.title: Razer’s Niko Edition BlackShark V3 Pro ANC gaming headset with detachable mic hits Amazon low at $200
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Razer’s BlackShark V3 Pro Niko Edition ANC gaming headset down to $199.99 shipped. This is regularly a $270 unit, which is now seeing a $70 discount. We did see the white variant of this headset go for less earlier this month as part of a short-lived Woot offer, and today’s discount at Amazon lands the Niko Edition variant within just $10 of that price. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this gaming headset at Amazon, making this a great time to cash in and snag one for your battlestation. You can also get this in a handful of other finishes, all of which are currently fetching their full price except the black one, that’s down to $209.99 shipped. Head below for more details.

You get a great value for your money here, especially considering the 67W 3-port car charger alone is currently selling for $40 at Amazon. Deals like this tend to move quickly, so it may be worth grabbing this while the discount is still available.
